OGRA has announced a fuel price increase of PKR 14.97 per litre effective
November 1st, 2024. The decision follows a surge in global crude oil prices
and continued depreciation of the Pakistani Rupee against the US Dollar.
The USD/PKR exchange rate currently stands at 285.50, a 6.2% decline over
the past 30 days. Industry analysts from the Pakistan Bureau of Statistics
estimate this will increase logistics costs by approximately 18% for delivery
companies operating in Punjab and Sindh. Al-Faisal Logistics, one of
Pakistan's largest freight operators with 4,200 monthly shipments, has
announced it will review its pricing structure within the next 72 hours.
The company's current delivery cost is PKR 320 per kilogram.
